onboarding.welcome_text: A gentle space to align who you are, how you feel, and what you do — one small step at a time.
onboarding.how_text: Set 3 simple intentions each morning: one for your growth, one for your wellbeing, and one for your connection to life.
onboarding.ritual_text: Log your mood, check in with yourself, and let go of what is not yours to carry. Small steps still count.
